choices.title: No no no no no no, you should not be here!

choice.title: Holy dingbat in a bat cave, what the frak are you?
choice.response: I am STR_NAME, brewer and inventor of Cowrain!

choice.title: Uhh, what is this Cowrain?
choice.response: It's beer made from the finest ingredients!

choice.title: I don't care, I'm here to end your filthy business.
choice.response: Haha, say hello to my little friends!

choice.title: I'm guessing there's a lot of soy in that beer.
choice.response: Soy? Only boys that poke each other use soy!

choice.title: Actually, I'll just end you here and now.
choice.response: Haha, say hello to my little friends!

choice.title: If it's not soy then it must be something special.
choice.response: Indeed, it's made from bat soup and mad cow urine!

choice.title: Why did I even bothered to ask, just die already!
choice.response: Haha, say hello to my little friends!

choice.title: Wait a minute, what are you talking about?
choice.response: Plenty of bats here as you may have noticed already.

choice.title: Wow, I'm definitely going to end this now!
choice.response: Haha, say hello to my little friends!

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned about mad cow urine.

choice.title: What was that about mad cow urine?
choice.response: It gives the flavor and name to the product.

choice.title: Yuuup, your time is up now!
choice.response: Haha, say hello to my little friends!

choice.title: Flavor and product name, seriously?
choice.response: Cow rain sounds much better than cow shower, haha!

choices.title: STR_NAME has told you everything there is to know.

choice.title: It's time for me to come inside your no no square!
choice.response: Haha, say hello to my little friends!
